traits.name: Acolyte
traits.description: Acquire a random Trait and some Hunt Dollars when you or your team picks up a Clue.

traits.name: Adrenaline
traits.description: When you enter critical health (below 25 HP), you will receive a small Stamina boost (50 stamina).

traits.name: All Ears
traits.description: While using Dark Sight, decreases Dark Sight noise by 50% and increases sounds of enemy Hunters in the direction you're facing by 50%.

traits.name: Ambidextrous
traits.description: Quicker reloading of matched pairs (25% faster), and custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistol sets (25% faster).

weapon_synergies.reason: Speeds up the custom clip reload for this semi-auto shotgun, reducing downtime.
Accelerates the custom clip reload for this semi-auto shotgun, improving fire rate.
Enables faster custom clip reloads for this semi-auto pistol, increasing sustained DPS.
Quicker custom clip reloads for this semi-auto pistol, crucial in close fights.

traits.name: Assailant
traits.description: Increases melee effectiveness of Throwing Knives and Throwing Axes (50% more damage).

weapon_synergies.reason: Increases throwing knife/axe damage, but does not affect the bat itself.
Boosts throwing knife/axe effectiveness, but not the saber's melee.
Enhances throwing knife/axe damage, irrelevant to the axe's melee.
Improves throwing knife/axe performance, not the katana's melee.
Assailant boosts throwing melee damage; Machete is melee but not thrown, so no benefit.
Assailant boosts throwing melee damage; Railroad Hammer is melee but not thrown, so no benefit.
Assailant boosts throwing melee damage; Shredder is melee but not thrown, so no benefit.

tool_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect standard knife.
Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives, making them more effective in close combat.
Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect heavy knife.
Assailant increases melee damage of throwing axes, improving their close-quarters lethality.
Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect dusters.
Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect knuckle knife.

traits.name: Beastface
traits.description: Reduce reaction range of animals by 50% (doesn't affect Monsters like Hellhounds).

traits.name: Berserker
traits.description: All melee attacks do double damage.

traits.name: Blade Seer
traits.description: While using Dark Sight, increases distance of highlighted Bolts, Arrows, Harpoon, Throwing Axes, and Throwing Knives to 75m. Also applies to Beetle View.

weapon_synergies.reason: Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Baseball Bat is not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Cavalry Saber is not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Combat Axe is not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Katana is not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Machete is not thrown, so no benefit.

Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons in Dark Sight, helping retrieve the Shredder after throwing it.

tool_synergies.reason: Blade Seer highlights thrown knives/axes in dark sight, but does not affect standard knife.
Blade Seer highlights thrown knives in dark sight up to 75m, aiding retrieval.
Blade Seer highlights thrown heavy knives in Dark Sight, making them easier to retrieve at range.
Blade Seer highlights thrown axes in Dark Sight, allowing retrieval from up to 75m away.
Dusters are not thrown, so Blade Seer has no effect on them.
Knuckle Knife is not thrown, so Blade Seer does not benefit it.

traits.name: Blademancer
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, take retrievable ammo in front of you (100m range).

traits.name: Blast Sense
traits.description: Loud sounds such as gunshots and explosions are highlighted while in Dark Sight (200m range). Gunshots from Silenced Weapons with Subsonic Ammo cannot be seen.

traits.name: Blazeborne
traits.description: Health restoration is greatly increased (4x) while in flames and you can't catch on fire.

traits.name: Bloodless
traits.description: Bleeding will not escalate from light to medium or intense bleeding.

traits.name: Bolt Thrower
traits.description: Reduced reload time for Crossbows, Bomb Launchers, and Bomb Lances (25% faster).

weapon_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Chu Ko Nu.
Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Crossbow.
Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Hand Crossbow.
Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Hunting Bow.

traits.name: Bruiser
traits.description: Reduces melee stamina consumption by 25% and flinching when taking damage by 50%.

traits.name: Bulletgrubber
traits.description: Recover unfired round when performing partial reloads.

traits.name: Bulwark
traits.description: Reduce the damage from explosions by 50%. Vastly reduces the duration of being fully blinded by a Flash Bomb.

traits.name: Catalyst
traits.description: Unlock Conditional Trait Effects on the Beastface, Kiteskin, Vigilant, Pain Sense, and Frontiersman Traits. Conditional Effects activate when their base Trait is equipped.

traits.name: Communion
traits.description: While using Dark Sight, temporarily lower your Max HP by 15 to heal your teammate 75 HP and remove their negative status effects (25m).

traits.name: Conduit
traits.description: Get a health and stamina boost when your team picks up a Clue or closes a Rift.

traits.name: Corpse Seer
traits.description: Receive Dark Sight Boost when looting downed Hunters.

traits.name: Crack Shot
traits.description: Reduce sway for weapons and increase zoom level in iron sights for rifles and pistols with stocks. Excludes shotguns and sawed-off variants.

weapon_synergies.reason: Crack Shot reduces sway and increases zoom for rifles/pistols with stocks, but Auto-4 Shorty is a shotgun and excluded.
Crack Shot reduces sway and increases zoom for rifles/pistols with stocks, but Auto-5 is a shotgun and excluded.
Reduces sway on the Bornheim's iron sights, improving accuracy for follow-up shots at medium range.
Reduces sway on the Dolch's iron sights, enhancing precision for rapid semi-auto fire.
Crack Shot does not benefit the Drilling because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Crack Shot does not benefit the Haymaker because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Crack Shot does not benefit the Homestead 78 because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Crack Shot does not benefit the LeMat because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Crack Shot does not benefit the Marathon because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Crack Shot does not benefit the Rival 78 because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Romero 77.
Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Slate.
Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Specter 1882.
Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Terminus.

traits.name: Dauntless
traits.description: Thrown explosives can be defused when interacting with them.

traits.name: Deadeye Scopesmith
traits.description: See also: Scopesmith, Marksman Scopesmith, Sniper Scopesmith.

weapon_synergies.reason: Deadeye Scopesmith reduces sway and increases zoom for Deadeye scopes, benefiting the Maynard Sniper.

traits.name: Death Cheat
traits.description: You will not lose your Hunter if you fail to extract, but equipment and missing Health Chunks will be lost.

traits.name: Decoy Supply
traits.description: Restock all types of Decoys from ammo crates.

traits.name: Determination
traits.description: Stamina recovery starts sooner.

traits.name: Dewclaw
traits.description: Enhances the melee attack of a bow and arrow.

weapon_synergies.reason: Dewclaw enhances the melee attack of bows, making the Chu Ko Nu's stock strike stronger.
Dewclaw enhances the melee attack of bows, making the Crossbow's stock strike stronger.
Dewclaw enhances the melee attack of bows, making the Hand Crossbow's stock strike stronger.
Dewclaw boosts the bow's melee damage, making it a viable close-range finisher without switching weapons.

traits.name: Doctor
traits.description: Doubles the amount of Health restored by First Aid Kit.

tool_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles the health restored by First Aid Kit, from 50 to 100.
Medical Pack is a tool, not a consumable; Doctor only affects First Aid Kit.
Doctor only affects First Aid Kit, not Vitality Shots.
Doctor only affects First Aid Kit, not Vitality Shots.
Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Stamina Shot does not restore health.
Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Stamina Shot does not restore health.
Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Regeneration Shot does not restore health.
Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Regeneration Shot does not restore health.

traits.name: Fanning
traits.description: Faster rate of fire when using one-handed or two-handed single-action pistols.

weapon_synergies.reason: Fanning does not affect semi-auto pistols like the Bornheim; it only works on single-action revolvers.
Fanning greatly increases the Conversion's fire rate, allowing rapid follow-up shots from the hip.
Fanning does not affect semi-auto pistols like the Dolch; it only works on single-action revolvers.
Fanning increases the Haymaker's fire rate, enabling quick successive shots despite its long ammo.
Fanning boosts the LeMat's fire rate, letting you rapidly fire compact ammo or the shotgun barrel.
Fanning dramatically increases the Nagant's fire rate, turning it into a close-range spam weapon.
Fanning boosts the New Army's fire rate, allowing faster follow-up shots despite its double-action mechanism.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols like Pax, allowing faster follow-up shots.
Fanning boosts fire rate for single-action pistols like Scottfield, enabling quicker successive shots.

traits.name: Fast Fingers
traits.description: Prepare some bullets in hand to reload single-shot rifles, and their non-pistol variants, faster.

weapon_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles; Bornheim is semi-auto, so no benefit.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles; Dolch is semi-auto, so no benefit.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles; Drilling's rifle barrel is single-shot, so benefits.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles like Martini-Henry, reducing downtime.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles like Sparks, allowing faster follow-up shots.

traits.name: Final Gasp
traits.description: Looting a Hunter triggers a Restoration effect for your Hunter. (Burn Trait)

traits.name: Fire Eater
traits.description: In exchange for 1 Pledge Mark, when a health chunk is burnt away, it is instead instantly restored.

traits.name: Flame Touched
traits.description: If you have 4 Pledge Marks, you can't catch on fire even when downed, but your health chunks still burn at a slower rate while in flames.

traits.name: Frontiersman
traits.description: Carried Tools can be used one extra time.

traits.name: Gator Legs
traits.description: Walk and sprint faster in deep water. Also make less noise while crouched in water.

traits.name: Ghoul
traits.description: Killing Monsters restores a small amount of health.

traits.name: Greyhound
traits.description: Sprint at full speed for a longer duration.

traits.name: Gunrunner
traits.description: Equip up to two Large Slot weapons on your Hunter.

traits.name: Hornskin
traits.description: Reduce damage taken from blunt damage by 25%.

traits.name: Hundred Hands
traits.description: Increases the damage of a Hunting Bow and reduces sway while at full draw. Allows use of arrows in melee attacks.

weapon_synergies.reason: Hundred Hands increases bow damage and reduces sway; Chu Ko Nu is a crossbow, not a bow.
Reduces sway at full draw for better accuracy and increases damage, making crossbow bolts more lethal.
Reduces sway at full draw for better accuracy and increases damage, making hand crossbow bolts more lethal.
Increases damage and reduces sway at full draw, improving hunting bow's one-hit kill potential.

traits.name: Indomitable
traits.description: If you have 4 Pledge Marks, health regenerates continuously until fully healed.

traits.name: Instinct
traits.description: While in Dark Sight, sense when enemy Hunters are nearby. (75m)

traits.name: Iron Devastator
traits.description: See also: Iron Eye, Iron Repeater, Iron Sharpshooter.

traits.name: Iron Eye
traits.description: Remain in iron sights between shots when firing bolt-action, lever-action, and pump-action Weapons.

weapon_synergies.reason: Allows staying in iron sights between lever-action shots, maintaining target acquisition for faster follow-ups.
Iron Eye does not benefit semi-auto shotguns; trait is for bolt/lever/pump only.
Iron Eye does not benefit semi-auto shotguns; trait is for bolt/lever/pump only.
Keeps iron sights aligned between bolt-action shots, enabling quicker follow-up shots without re-aiming.
Allows staying in iron sights between lever-action shots, maintaining target acquisition for faster follow-ups.

Iron Eye does not benefit the Haymaker as it is a revolver, not bolt/lever/pump-action.

traits.name: Iron Repeater
traits.description: See also: Iron Eye, Iron Devastator, Iron Sharpshooter.

traits.name: Iron Sharpshooter
traits.description: See also: Iron Eye , Iron Devastator , Iron Repeater .

traits.name: Kiteskin
traits.description: Significantly reduces fall damage.

traits.name: Levering
traits.description: Faster rate of fire from the hip (First aim stage) when using lever-action weapons.

weapon_synergies.reason: Levering increases hip-fire rate, making the 1865 Carbine more effective in close-quarters spam.
Levering boosts hip-fire rate, allowing the Centennial to deliver rapid medium-ammo shots up close.
Levering increases hip-fire rate for lever-action rifles, letting the Mako 1895 spam shots faster in close range.
Levering boosts hip-fire speed on lever-action shotguns, allowing the Terminus to pump out shells rapidly.
Levering raises hip-fire rate for lever-action weapons, making the Wildland fire faster without aiming.

traits.name: Lightfoot
traits.description: Vault, fall and climb ladders silently. Also reduces the sound of walking through noise traps.

traits.name: Magpie
traits.description: Receive three short effects when picking up a Bounty Token: Antidote, Stamina and Regeneration.

traits.name: Mariner
traits.description: Health and Stamina regeneration is greatly increased while in water and marginally increased while exposed to heavy rain.

traits.name: Marksman Scopesmith
traits.description: See also: Scopesmith , Deadeye Scopesmith , Sniper Scopesmith .

weapon_synergies.reason: Marksman Scopesmith reduces sway and speeds up aiming for scoped rifles, improving the Maynard Sniper's precision.

traits.name: Martialist
traits.description: Allows a Katana to be sheathed, which enables a first strike attack that does extra damage.

traits.name: Mithridatist
traits.description: Drastically reduces the time needed to recover from poisoning .

traits.name: Necromancer
traits.description: Using Dark Sight , revive a downed teammate from a distance. (25m)

traits.name: Packmule
traits.description: Receive an additional Tool or Consumable when looting dead enemy Hunters or opening item boxes.

traits.name: Pain Sense
traits.description: You can see nearby bleeding , poisoned and burning Hunters while in Dark Sight . Also applies to Beetle view. (150m)

traits.name: Peacekeeper
traits.description: Looting a Hunter will restore one Health Chunk.

traits.name: Physician
traits.description: Reduce the time needed to bandage.

tool_synergies.reason: Physician reduces bandage time, speeding up First Aid Kit usage.
Physician reduces bandage time, speeding up Medical Pack usage.
Physician reduces bandage time, but Vitality Shot is not a bandage item.
Physician reduces bandage time, but Vitality Shot is not a bandage item.

Physician speeds up bandaging, but Stamina Shot does not require bandaging; no direct benefit.
Physician speeds up bandaging, but Regeneration Shot does not require bandaging; no direct benefit.

Pitcher extends throw range for aim-helper explosives, allowing the Bomb Launcher to lob bombs further.

tool_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Fire Bomb to be thrown farther and more accurately.

traits.name: Poacher
traits.description: Place and disarm traps quietly.

traits.name: Poltergeist
traits.description: Players can manipulate, interact, and agitate in-world objects and animals remotely via Dark Sight. (50m) Works in Beetle View.

traits.name: Quartermaster
traits.description: Gain +1 Weapon Capacity

traits.name: Rampage
traits.description: Killing an enemy Hunter while at least one Health Chunk is empty triggers a Restoration for your Hunter.

traits.name: Relentless
traits.description: Your Hunter won't lose a Health Chunk when downed.

traits.name: Remedy
traits.description: While using Dark Sight, interact with a Trait Spur within range to trigger a Restoration effect for your team. (25m) Also applies to Beetle view.

traits.name: Resilience
traits.description: Your Hunter is revived with up to full health.

traits.name: Salveskin
traits.description: While alive, reduce all fire damage by 25% and stop burn speed and stop time from escalating.

traits.name: Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a scope.

traits.name: Serpent
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, interact with nearby Clues, Rifts, Banishable Targets and abandoned Bounty Tokens. (25m) Applies to Beetle view, except for Bounty Token interactions.

traits.name: Shadow
traits.description: Monsters can't see you, but they can still hear you.

traits.name: Shadow Crush
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, damage any Monster or Target once. (25m)

traits.name: Shadow Leap
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, channel a Monster within range to jump to its location and kill it instantly. Excludes Targets. (50m)

traits.name: Signee
traits.description: Boost Event Points by 10%.

traits.name: Silent Killer
traits.description: Reduces the sound you make when performing melee attacks by 80%.

traits.name: Sniper Scopesmith
traits.description: See also: Scopesmith , Deadeye Scopesmith , Marksman Scopesmith .

traits.name: Steady Aim
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens when you're looking through a scope or Aperture sights.

traits.name: Steady Hand
traits.description: See also: Steady Aim .

traits.name: Surefoot
traits.description: You can sprint while holding primed Throwables, First Aid Kits , and Consumable Shots.

tool_synergies.reason: Surefoot allows sprinting while holding first aid kit, enabling faster repositioning during healing.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding medical pack, enabling faster repositioning during healing.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding vitality shot, enabling faster repositioning during healing.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding vitality shot, enabling faster repositioning during healing.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding stamina shot, enabling faster repositioning during healing.
Surefoot lets you sprint while priming Stamina Shot, enabling faster repositioning during combat.
Surefoot lets you sprint while priming Weak Regen Shot, allowing safe healing on the move.
Surefoot lets you sprint while priming Regen Shot, maintaining mobility while healing.

traits.name: Tomahawk
traits.description: See also: Assailant .

traits.name: Vigilant
traits.description: Nearby traps and active Beetles are highlighted in Dark Sight . Also applies to Beetle view. (25m)

traits.name: Vigor
traits.description: While in Dark Sight , doubles the rate at which Health and Stamina regenerate.

traits.name: Vulture
traits.description: Looting a dead enemy Hunter will always reward you Hunt Dollars .

traits.name: Whispersmith
traits.description: Reduces noise when selecting equipment.

traits.name: Witness
traits.description: While in Dark Sight , dead Hunters and Monsters are visible. Also applies to Beetle view.

weapons.name: 1865 Carbine
weapons.description: Specter Arms made, repeating rifle. Well-balanced and fast reloads make this effective at medium range, but lacks Levering.

trait_synergies.reason: Allows staying in iron sights between lever-action shots, maintaining target acquisition for faster follow-ups.
Levering increases hip-fire rate, making the 1865 Carbine more effective in close-quarters spam.

weapons.name: 1890 Cavalry
weapons.description: See also: Springfield 1866 .

weapons.name: Auto-4 Shorty
weapons.description: Crown & King made, semi-automatic shotgun. Dominates close range with high power and fire-rate, but has a strong recoil. Shortened stock and barrel with one less round than the Auto-5 .

trait_synergies.reason: Speeds up the custom clip reload for this semi-auto shotgun, reducing downtime.
Crack Shot reduces sway and increases zoom for rifles/pistols with stocks, but Auto-4 Shorty is a shotgun and excluded.
Iron Eye does not benefit semi-auto shotguns; trait is for bolt/lever/pump only.

weapons.name: Auto-5
weapons.description: Crown & King made, semi-automatic shotgun. Dominates close range with high power and fire-rate, but has a strong recoil.

trait_synergies.reason: Accelerates the custom clip reload for this semi-auto shotgun, improving fire rate.
Crack Shot reduces sway and increases zoom for rifles/pistols with stocks, but Auto-5 is a shotgun and excluded.
Iron Eye does not benefit semi-auto shotguns; trait is for bolt/lever/pump only.

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.description: Wooden Baseball Bat that swings fast and powerfully.

trait_synergies.reason: Increases throwing knife/axe damage, but does not affect the bat itself.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Baseball Bat is not thrown, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Berthier 1892
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action carbine. High power for its light barrel. Partial reloads are punishing.

trait_synergies.reason: Keeps iron sights aligned between bolt-action shots, enabling quicker follow-up shots without re-aiming.

weapons.name: Bomb Lance
weapons.description: Bladed harpoon launcher, adapted to fire projectiles with a delayed explosive. Lethal at short range but cumbersome to reload.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range for aim-helper items, letting the Bomb Lance's explosive harpoon fly farther.

weapons.name: Bomb Launcher
weapons.description: This compact launcher fires spring-loaded projectiles over short distances. Deals tremendous damage on direct impact.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range for aim-helper explosives, allowing the Bomb Launcher to lob bombs further.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3
weapons.description: German made, semi-automatic pistol. High fire-rate and velocity, and low recoil. Balanced by low power and wasteful reloads. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Enables faster custom clip reloads for this semi-auto pistol, increasing sustained DPS.
Reduces sway on the Bornheim's iron sights, improving accuracy for follow-up shots at medium range.
Fanning does not affect semi-auto pistols like the Bornheim; it only works on single-action revolvers.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles; Bornheim is semi-auto, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Cavalry Saber
weapons.description: One-handed saber in use since the Civil War. Lightweight with good reach.

trait_synergies.reason: Boosts throwing knife/axe effectiveness, but not the saber's melee.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Cavalry Saber is not thrown, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Centennial
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range.

trait_synergies.reason: Allows staying in iron sights between lever-action shots, maintaining target acquisition for faster follow-ups.
Levering boosts hip-fire rate, allowing the Centennial to deliver rapid medium-ammo shots up close.

weapons.name: Chu Ko Nu
weapons.description: Repeating Crossbow that fires Compact Bolts. Has a high rate of fire and is quiet. Bolts can be recovered and reused.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Chu Ko Nu.
Dewclaw enhances the melee attack of bows, making the Chu Ko Nu's stock strike stronger.
Hundred Hands increases bow damage and reduces sway; Chu Ko Nu is a crossbow, not a bow.

weapons.name: Combat Axe
weapons.description: Two-handed axe that swings slowly but splits skulls.

trait_synergies.reason: Enhances throwing knife/axe damage, irrelevant to the axe's melee.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Combat Axe is not thrown, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Conversion
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Slow to reload, but reliable and accurate. Converted to fire cartridges. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning greatly increases the Conversion's fire rate, allowing rapid follow-up shots from the hip.

weapons.name: Crossbow
weapons.description: See also: Hand Crossbow .

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Crossbow.
Dewclaw enhances the melee attack of bows, making the Crossbow's stock strike stronger.
Reduces sway at full draw for better accuracy and increases damage, making crossbow bolts more lethal.

weapons.name: Dolch 96
weapons.description: Ludwig Arms made, semi-automatic pistol. High power and fire-rate. When empty, can be reloaded with a stripper clip. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Quicker custom clip reloads for this semi-auto pistol, crucial in close fights.
Reduces sway on the Dolch's iron sights, enhancing precision for rapid semi-auto fire.
Fanning does not affect semi-auto pistols like the Dolch; it only works on single-action revolvers.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles; Dolch is semi-auto, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Drilling
weapons.description: German made, break-action combination firearm with two rifle barrels and single shotgun underbarrel. Highly flexible.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot does not benefit the Drilling because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles; Drilling's rifle barrel is single-shot, so benefits.
The Drilling's shotgun barrel is single-shot; Iron Eye keeps sights up for follow-up rifle shots.

weapons.name: Flame Rifle
weapons.description: Custom-made, rifle conversion that releases pressurized liquid which ignites on ejection, producing a steady burst of flames. Requires pumping to increase pressure - higher pressure means longer reaching flames. The pressure is lost over time and while shooting. Can only resupply at Oil Barrels .

weapons.name: Frontier 73C
weapons.description: See also: Infantry 73L , Ranger 73 , Vandal 73C .

weapons.name: Hand Crossbow
weapons.description: Hand Crossbow that fires compact bolts. Quiet at range and convenient to carry. Bolts can be retrieved and reused.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Hand Crossbow.
Dewclaw enhances the melee attack of bows, making the Hand Crossbow's stock strike stronger.
Reduces sway at full draw for better accuracy and increases damage, making hand crossbow bolts more lethal.

weapons.name: Haymaker
weapons.description: Re-envisioned, single-action combination revolver with an additional shotgun barrel. A Long Ammo conversion of the LeMat.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot does not benefit the Haymaker because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Fanning increases the Haymaker's fire rate, enabling quick successive shots despite its long ammo.
Iron Eye does not benefit the Haymaker as it is a revolver, not bolt/lever/pump-action.

weapons.name: Homestead 78
weapons.description: Sturdy, break-action, side-by-side shotgun with a long barrel that can destroy all but the toughest targets.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot does not benefit the Homestead 78 because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
The Homestead 78 is pump-action; Iron Eye keeps sights up for faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Hunting Bow
weapons.description: Hunting Bow that fires arrows a great distance. Perfect for stealth. Arrows can be recovered and reused.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, allowing faster follow-up shots with the Hunting Bow.
Dewclaw boosts the bow's melee damage, making it a viable close-range finisher without switching weapons.
Increases damage and reduces sway at full draw, improving hunting bow's one-hit kill potential.

weapons.name: Infantry 73L
weapons.description: See also: Frontier 73C , Ranger 73 , Vandal 73C .

weapons.name: Katana
weapons.description: Two-handed, single-edged sword. Swift and sharp enough to pierce the sturdiest armor.

trait_synergies.reason: Improves throwing knife/axe performance, not the katana's melee.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Katana is not thrown, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Krag
weapons.description: See also: Springfield 1866 .

weapons.name: Lebel 1886
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action rifle. High magazine capacity, damage, and velocity are offset with a slow and wasteful reload.

trait_synergies.reason: The Lebel is bolt-action; Iron Eye maintains sight picture for quicker successive shots.

weapons.name: LeMat
weapons.description: Re-envisioned, single-action combination revolver with an additional shotgun barrel. High capacity and strong at close range. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot does not benefit the LeMat because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
Fanning boosts the LeMat's fire rate, letting you rapidly fire compact ammo or the shotgun barrel.
Iron Eye does not benefit the LeMat as it is a revolver, not bolt/lever/pump-action.

weapons.name: Machete
weapons.description: One-handed machete, reliable and convenient to carry.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant boosts throwing melee damage; Machete is melee but not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee in dark sight; Machete is not thrown, so no benefit.

weapons.name: Mako 1895
weapons.description: American made, lever-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high damage make this versatile. Can be topped off.

trait_synergies.reason: The Mako is lever-action; Iron Eye keeps sights aligned for rapid follow-up shots.
Levering increases hip-fire rate for lever-action rifles, letting the Mako 1895 spam shots faster in close range.

weapons.name: Marathon
weapons.description: Caldwell made, pump-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high capacity, but has a wasteful reload.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot does not benefit the Marathon because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
The Marathon is pump-action; Iron Eye retains sight picture for consecutive shots.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry
weapons.description: British made, single-shot breech-loading rifle. Can be quickly reloaded and offers good power.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles like Martini-Henry, reducing downtime.

weapons.name: Maynard Sniper
weapons.description: A scoped rifle with high damage and medium ammo. Requires a two-stage reload with the placement of a percussion cap.

trait_synergies.reason: Deadeye Scopesmith reduces sway and increases zoom for Deadeye scopes, benefiting the Maynard Sniper.
Marksman Scopesmith reduces sway and speeds up aiming for scoped rifles, improving the Maynard Sniper's precision.

weapons.name: Mosin Obrez
weapons.description: See also: Mosin-Nagant .

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant
weapons.description: See also: Mosin Obrez .

weapons.name: Nagant M1895
weapons.description: Nagant made, single-action revolver. Medium damage, with a decent muzzle velocity and capacity. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning dramatically increases the Nagant's fire rate, turning it into a close-range spam weapon.

weapons.name: New Army
weapons.description: Caldwell made, double-action revolver. High cycle rate and good damage, but balanced by low muzzle velocity. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning boosts the New Army's fire rate, allowing faster follow-up shots despite its double-action mechanism.

weapons.name: Nitro Express
weapons.description: American made, break-action rifle with two barrels. High power, but limited ammunition, and damage drops over range.

weapons.name: Officer
weapons.description: See also: Nagant M1895 .

weapons.name: Pax
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Reliable, accurate, and sturdy. Once brought peace to the lawless west. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols like Pax, allowing faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Railroad Hammer
weapons.description: Two-handed Hammer, swings with weight and power.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant boosts throwing melee damage; Railroad Hammer is melee but not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons in Dark Sight, helping retrieve the Railroad Hammer after throwing it.

weapons.name: Ranger 73
weapons.description: See also: Frontier 73C , Infantry 73L , Vandal 73C .

weapons.name: Rival 78
weapons.description: Caldwell made, break-action shotgun with two barrels. High damage but high pellet spread, two-tapping gives it an edge.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot does not benefit the Rival 78 because it is a shotgun, which is excluded.
The Rival 78 is pump-action; Iron Eye keeps sights up for faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Romero 77
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Romero 77.
Iron Eye allows you to stay aimed after each pump, enabling faster follow-up shots with the Romero 77.

weapons.name: Scottfield
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning boosts fire rate for single-action pistols like Scottfield, enabling quicker successive shots.

weapons.name: Shredder
weapons.description: Experimental weapon that shoots sawblades. Sawblades bounce off hard surfaces and rip into targets. Runes etchings give them the potential to ricochet in the direction of nearby enemies. Must be spun before firing. Only found at the circus.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant boosts throwing melee damage; Shredder is melee but not thrown, so no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons in Dark Sight, helping retrieve the Shredder after throwing it.

weapons.name: Slate
weapons.description: Winfield made, pump-action shotgun. High damage and fast cycle rate, with high pellet spread.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Slate.
Iron Eye keeps you in sights after each pump, improving follow-up shot speed with the Slate.

weapons.name: Sparks
weapons.description: Big-game, single-shot rifle. High power and very effective at range, but cumbersome. Can put down a bison across a prairie.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds reload for single-shot rifles like Sparks, allowing faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Specter 1882
weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Specter 1882.
Iron Eye maintains aim after each pump, allowing quicker successive shots with the Specter 1882.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866
weapons.description: See also: 1890 Cavalry .

weapons.name: Terminus
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating shotgun. High capacity and damage, but wasteful reloads.

trait_synergies.reason: Crack Shot excludes shotguns, so it does not benefit the Terminus.
Iron Eye keeps you aimed after each lever cycle, enabling faster follow-up shots with the Terminus.
Levering boosts hip-fire speed on lever-action shotguns, allowing the Terminus to pump out shells rapidly.

weapons.name: Uppercut
weapons.description: See also: Conversion .

weapons.name: Vandal 73C
weapons.description: See also: Frontier 73C , Infantry 73L , Ranger 73 .

weapons.name: Vetterli 71
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you scoped after each bolt cycle, allowing quicker follow-up shots with the Vetterli 71.

weapons.name: Wildland
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. Based on the Centennial , it features a long barrel and Swift reloader.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye maintains aim after each lever cycle, enabling faster follow-up shots with the Wildland.
Levering raises hip-fire rate for lever-action weapons, making the Wildland fire faster without aiming.

tools.name: Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact. Spreads burning liquid over a large area.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Fire Bomb to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Liquid Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container. Burns on the surface of water. Internal steel balls cause it to burst on impact.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Liquid Fire Bomb to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Hellfire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact and creates a massive fireball.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Hellfire Bomb to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Knife
tools.description: An all-purpose tool and melee weapon that has saved many lives - and taken just as many.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect standard knife.
Blade Seer highlights thrown knives/axes in dark sight, but does not affect standard knife.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Knife to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Throwing Knives
tools.description: Silent, but short-ranged projectile weapon. Thrown knives can be retrieved and re-used.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives, making them more effective in close combat.
Blade Seer highlights thrown knives in dark sight up to 75m, aiding retrieval.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing knives to hit distant targets more effectively.

tools.name: Heavy Knife
tools.description: The heavy knife is honed for close quarters combat, its iconic silhouette carves out its home in the American pantheon of armaments.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect heavy knife.
Blade Seer highlights thrown heavy knives in Dark Sight, making them easier to retrieve at range.
Pitcher extends throwing range, making heavy knife throws viable at longer distances.

tools.name: Throwing Axes
tools.description: Silent and deadly short-ranged projectile weapon. Can be retrieved and reused.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing axes, improving their close-quarters lethality.
Blade Seer highlights thrown axes in Dark Sight, allowing retrieval from up to 75m away.
Pitcher boosts throwing range, enabling axes to reach enemies from safer positions.

tools.name: Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick that detonates with a massive blast after four seconds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw distance, allowing dynamite to be tossed farther for safer detonations.

tools.name: Waxed Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick with a modified powder fuse that enables detonation under water and in choke bomb clouds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends range, letting waxed dynamite be thrown further without risk of water dousing.

tools.name: Sticky Bomb
tools.description: Dynamite charge in a sticky frame that can be attached to objects and enemies. Its eight-second fuse doubles the detonation time of a dynamite stick.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, helping sticky bombs attach to targets from a distance.

tools.name: Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of several dynamite sticks. Why only bring one?

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher boosts throw distance, enabling dynamite bundles to be tossed farther for area denial.

tools.name: Frag Bomb
tools.description: Frag bombs send lethal shrapnel over a large area, lacerating nearby enemies. unlike dynamite however, the blast is not strong enough to destroy doors or concertina wire.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases range, allowing frag bombs to be thrown further for safer fragmentation.

tools.name: Big Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of many dynamite sticks. When something really needs to be blown up.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing safer placement of the Big Dynamite Bundle from distance.

tools.name: First Aid Kit
tools.description: A bag of medical supplies that heal 50 health and stop bleeding. Can be used three times.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles the health restored by First Aid Kit, from 50 to 100.
Physician reduces bandage time, speeding up First Aid Kit usage.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding first aid kit, enabling faster repositioning during healing.

tools.name: Medical Pack
tools.description: A portable medical kit that heals 100 health. Deployable in active health emergencies.

trait_synergies.reason: Medical Pack is a tool, not a consumable; Doctor only affects First Aid Kit.
Physician reduces bandage time, speeding up Medical Pack usage.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding medical pack, enabling faster repositioning during healing.

tools.name: Decoys
tools.description: A bag of scrap metal and glass. When thrown the noise can be effectively used to distract or divert enemies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling decoys to be thrown farther to distract enemies.

tools.name: Alert Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases firecrackers and a small flare, alerting others to its location. Comes in a pack of four.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Alert Trip Mines to be placed at longer distances.

tools.name: Chaos Bomb
tools.description: Set of firecrackers that can be used to temporarily distract nearby enemies. Duration of about 30 seconds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Chaos Bombs to be thrown farther to create distractions.

tools.name: Blank Fire Decoys
tools.description: A decoy that imitates the sound of a gunshot on impact. Useful to distract and confuse enemies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Blank Fire Decoys to be thrown farther to simulate gunfire.

tools.name: Decoy Fuses
tools.description: Pack of decoy fuses that can be used to breach closed doors and window shutters. It can also imitate the behavior of a lit bomb and can fool your enemies in clearing a space.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Decoy Fuses to be thrown farther to mimic explosives.

tools.name: Fusees
tools.description: Handheld railroad flares used for illuminating dark areas and for signalling. Can ignite flammable materials. Comes in a pack of three.

tools.name: Flare Pistol
tools.description: A small pistol for firing flares into the air, illuminating the area. Can ignite flammable materials.

tools.name: Vitality Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores 75 health.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor only affects First Aid Kit, not Vitality Shots.
Physician reduces bandage time, but Vitality Shot is not a bandage item.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding vitality shot, enabling faster repositioning during healing.

tools.name: Vitality Shot
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all health.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor only affects First Aid Kit, not Vitality Shots.
Physician reduces bandage time, but Vitality Shot is not a bandage item.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding vitality shot, enabling faster repositioning during healing.

tools.name: Stamina Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 5 minutes.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Stamina Shot does not restore health.
Physician speeds up bandaging, but Stamina Shot does not require bandaging; no direct benefit.
Surefoot allows sprinting while holding stamina shot, enabling faster repositioning during healing.

tools.name: Stamina Shot
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 10 minutes.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Stamina Shot does not restore health.
Physician speeds up bandaging, but Stamina Shot does not require bandaging; no direct benefit.
Surefoot lets you sprint while priming Stamina Shot, enabling faster repositioning during combat.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot that continually restores health over a short duration.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Regeneration Shot does not restore health.
Physician speeds up bandaging, but Regeneration Shot does not require bandaging; no direct benefit.
Surefoot lets you sprint while priming Weak Regen Shot, allowing safe healing on the move.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot
tools.description: A shot that continuously restores health until fully healed.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kit, but Regeneration Shot does not restore health.
Physician speeds up bandaging, but Regeneration Shot does not require bandaging; no direct benefit.
Surefoot lets you sprint while priming Regen Shot, maintaining mobility while healing.

tools.name: Poison Bomb
tools.description: On detonation emits a persistant, deadly cloud. Anything caught in or that passes through the cloud will be poisoned.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Poison Bombs to be thrown farther to deny areas.

tools.name: Antidote Shot (Weak)
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Antidote Shot to be thrown farther to allies.

tools.name: Antidote Shot
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing you to toss Antidote Shot farther to teammates or yourself.

tools.name: Hive Bomb
tools.description: Poisonous wasps emerge from this bomb to terrorize anyone unfortunate enough to be in the area. However it has no effect on monsters.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, letting you toss Hive Bombs farther to hit enemies from safer distances.

tools.name: Poison Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases a cloud of poison when triggered, disorienting enemies. Comes in a pack of two.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling you to place Poison Trip Mines from farther away.

tools.name: Dusters
tools.description: A row of metal rings worn on the hand in order to increase the damage caused in hand-to-hand combat.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect dusters.
Dusters are not thrown, so Blade Seer has no effect on them.
Pitcher does not benefit Dusters as they are melee tools, not thrown items.

tools.name: Knuckle Knife
tools.description: The savage knuckle knife is a roughshod specialization for close quarters combat, suited for both bludgeoning and brutal thrusting deathblows.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of throwing knives/axes, but does not affect knuckle knife.
Knuckle Knife is not thrown, so Blade Seer does not benefit it.
Pitcher does not benefit Knuckle Knife as it is a melee tool, not thrown.

tools.name: Stalker Beetle
tools.description: Stalker Beetles are bred to hunt and track prey, giving hunters a view from above. As a last resort, they can sacrifice themselves to cause a small explosion hampering anything caught in the radius.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing you to launch Stalker Beetles farther for scouting.

tools.name: Choke Beetle
tools.description: Choke Beetles are bred to hunt and track prey, giving Hunters a view from above. They have evolved to explode into a cloud of suffocating gas, which they themselves are immune to.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, letting you deploy Choke Beetles from greater distances.

tools.name: Fire Beetle
tools.description: Fire Beetles are bred to find and track pey, giving hunters a view from above. Upon death or command, they will burst into flames that burn everything they touch.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling you to send Fire Beetles farther to ignite enemies.

tools.name: Ammo Box
tools.description: This small portable Ammo Box partially refills your weapons' extra ammunition, including special ammunition types.

tools.name: Tool Box
tools.description: A portable toolkit that refills some dwindling supplies in a tight spot.

tools.name: Concertina Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine deploys a small concertina bundle perfect for blocking doors and windows. Comes in a pack of two.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer placement of concertina trip mines from distance.

tools.name: Concertina Bomb
tools.description: Spring-loaded razorwire coil that unfolds violently when thrown. Shreds and entangles anything that tries to move through.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, enabling you to deploy concertina bombs from safer positions.

tools.name: Flash Bomb
tools.description: Light bomb that requires a short priming for its mercury based chemical reaction. The explosion is capable of blinding all in close proximity, even if their eyes are shielded or averted. Needs a short time to be prepared.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, letting you flash enemies from farther away.
